item.author: grabbou

item.title: 从排序数组中删除重复项 | Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
item.description:
维克多·约瑟夫

发表于所以我解决了这个 leetcode 问题，可以在这里找到。

我的思考过程很简单。 我初始化了一个计数器变量（称为'a'），它将索引整个数组（从零开始），然后我在计算每个变量的同时遍历数组。 然后我检查变量的计数是否大于 1。如果是，则删除该特定变量，如果否，则增加计数器变量以移动到下一个索引。
在一天结束时，剩下的是计数等于 1 的数字。

希望你喜欢阅读，再见:)

克劳迪内·佩雷拉 - 一旦暂停，captainvee 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，captainvee 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，所有由 Captainvee 发布的帖子都将被隐藏，并且只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 Captainvee 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 Captainvee：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记的 Captainvee 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Victor Joseph

Posted on Sep 21 

class Solution:
    def removeDuplicates(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        a = 0
        for i in range(len(nums)):
            if nums.count(nums[a])>1:
                del nums[a]
            else:
                a+=1

So i solved this leetcode problem which can be found here.

My thought process was simple. I initialized a counter variable (called 'a') that would index the entire array (starting from zero) then i looped through the array while counting each variable. I then check if the count of the variable is greater than 1. If yes, then i delete that particular variable and if no, then i increment the counter variable to move to the next index.
At the end of the day, what is left are numbers whose count are equal to 1.

Hope you enjoyed reading, bye :)

Claudinei Pereira - Sep 21

Oluwanifemi Latunde - Sep 21

Once suspended, captainvee will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, captainvee will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by captainvee will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If captainvee is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag captainvee:

captainvee consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging captainvee will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: captainvee
